## Checklist

- [ ] `forge fmt` passes (pre-commit hook)
- [ ] `forge build` has no new warnings
- [ ] `forge test` passes
- [ ] New public/external functions have NatSpec (`@notice`, `@param`, `@return`)

- [ ] Any new invariants documented in `INVARIANTS.md`
- [ ] Coverage doesn't regress significantly (check the `lcov` artifact)
